info.name: MTBS - Multi-Tenant Billing System
info.description:
Enterprise-grade multi-tenant SaaS billing platform. 

Setup:
1. Set baseUrl to your server (default: http://localhost:8080)
2. Call POST /api/auth/register to create a tenant
3. accessToken and refreshToken are auto-captured on login/register
4. tenantId, userId, schemaName are auto-captured too

item.name: 🔐 Authentication
item.description: Tenant registration, login, token management

request.description: Register a new tenant business and create an OWNER user. Auto-captures accessToken, refreshToken, tenantId, userId, schemaName.
Authenticate a user within a specific tenant. Auto-captures all tokens.
Get a new access token using a valid refresh token.
Logout user and revoke their refresh token.
Get the currently authenticated user's profile details from JWT context.
Phase 0 onboarding. Creates tenant, provisions schema, returns JWT. Status = PENDING_ONBOARDING.
Sends a password reset email. Token stored in Redis with 15-min TTL.
Resets password using the token from the forgot-password email.

item.name: 🧭 Onboarding

request.description: Returns currentStep (0-3), completedSteps[], onboardingComplete flag. Call on app load to resume wizard.
Saves business details. Slug must be unique (lowercase, numbers, hyphens, 3-63 chars). Mirrors to public.tenants.
Saves KYC data. Sets kycStatus=SUBMITTED. Step 1 must be completed first.
Selects FREE plan. Activates tenant (status=ACTIVE). Fires ONBOARDING_COMPLETED event.
Selects PRO plan. paymentMethodToken required for paid plans.

item.description: 3-step onboarding wizard. Run: GET status → PUT step/1 → PUT step/2 → PUT step/3.

item.name: 🏢 Tenant Management
item.description: Manage your own tenant settings, status, and schema info

request.description: Get the current tenant's basic details.
Update the current tenant's display name.
Check the live status of the tenant's operation, active plan, and subscription.
Get high level counts: users, roles, tasks, subscriptions in this tenant's schema.
Deactivate the tenant to stop usage. Owner only.
Reactivate the tenant to resume usage. Owner only.

item.name: 👤 User Management
item.description: Manage users within the active tenant schema

request.description: List all active users in the tenant, paginated.
Create a new user within the current tenant. Auto-captures userId2.
Get complete profile details of the current authenticated user.
Update own profile and/or change password. Leave newPassword empty to skip password change.
Get a specific user by ID in the current tenant.
Update a specific user's basic details (name, email).
Change a user's role to any role that exists in the tenant.
Suspend or activate a user account. Values: ACTIVE, INACTIVE, SUSPENDED.
Soft delete a user from the tenant schema. Sets deleted=true.

item.name: 🎭 Role Management
item.description: Manage custom roles and assign permissions within the tenant

request.description: Get all roles in the current tenant including system roles.
Create a new custom role. Auto-captures roleId.
Get detailed information about a specific role including its permissions.
Update an existing custom role name.
Get all permissions currently assigned to a role.
Assign a single permission to a role by permissionId.
Remove a single permission from a role.
Delete a role if it is not a system role (OWNER/ADMIN/EMPLOYEE) and has no users assigned.

item.name: ✅ Task Management
item.description: Create, manage and track tasks within the tenant

request.description: List all tasks within the tenant, optionally filtered by keyword.
Create a new task. Triggers @TrackUsage(TASKS_CREATED). Auto-captures taskId.
Get a specific task's details.
Update an existing task title, description, or assignee.
List all tasks created by the currently authenticated user.
Get high-level statistics: totalTasks, myTasks, tasksThisMonth.
Assigns a task to a user. PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/assign.
Soft delete a task. Sets deleted=true.

item.name: 🔑 Permission Management
item.description: View and manage system and custom permissions (public schema)

request.description: Get a list of all available system and custom permissions from public schema.
Create a new custom permission globally in the public schema.
Get details of a specific permission.
Delete a custom permission. System permissions (seeded in V4) cannot be deleted.

item.name: 📦 Plans
item.description: Manage pricing plans. Public endpoints need no auth.

request.description: Returns all active and public plans. No authentication required.
Admin endpoint - returns all plans including inactive ones.
Get a specific plan by ID. No authentication required.
Create a new pricing plan.
Update an existing plan's details.
Soft-deletes and deactivates a plan. Does not affect existing subscriptions.

item.name: 💳 Subscriptions
item.description: Manage tenant subscriptions — start trial, activate, change plan, cancel

request.description: Returns the active or trialing subscription for the current tenant.
Starts a trial subscription for the given plan. planId must be a PRO or ENTERPRISE plan with trialDays > 0.
Activates a trialing or new subscription. billingCycle: MONTHLY or ANNUAL.
Changes the subscription to a different plan with proration.
Cancels the current subscription. atPeriodEnd=true cancels at end of billing period.

item.name: 🧾 Invoices
item.description: View, manage and download invoices for the tenant

request.description: Returns paginated list of invoices for the current tenant.
Returns a specific invoice with all line items.
Generates and downloads the invoice as a PDF file. Response is binary.
Voids an unpaid invoice. Cannot void a paid invoice.

item.name: 💰 Payments
item.description: Razorpay payment flow — create order → frontend checkout → verify

request.description: Returns all payments for the current tenant.
Returns a specific payment by ID.
Step 1 of payment flow: Creates a Razorpay Order for the invoice. Returns orderId and keyId for frontend Razorpay Checkout widget.
Step 2 of payment flow: Verifies Razorpay signature after frontend checkout. Get these values from Razorpay Checkout callback.

query.description: Amount to refund in paise (optional, full refund if empty)

request.description: Refunds a succeeded payment. Amount in paise (INR × 100). Leave empty for full refund.

item.name: 📊 Usage
item.description: Usage metering and limits for the tenant

request.description: Returns usage for all metrics (API_CALLS, ACTIVE_USERS, TASKS_CREATED, STORAGE_GB) in the current billing period.
Returns usage for a specific time period.
Returns the plan's max limits (maxUsers, maxTasks, maxApiCalls, maxStorageGb) for the current subscription.

item.name: 📈 Dashboard
item.description: Billing and admin metrics dashboards

request.description: Returns billing overview for the current tenant: subscription, usage metrics, recent invoice, payment summary.
Returns platform-wide admin metrics: MRR, ARR, tenant counts by plan, subscription stats, invoice and payment totals.

item.name: 🏪 Customers

request.description: Creates a customer and syncs to Razorpay (best-effort). Email must be unique in tenant. Requires CUSTOMER_MANAGE.
Paginated customer list. Optional ?search= filters by name or email. Requires CUSTOMER_MANAGE.
Returns a single customer. 404 if not found. Requires CUSTOMER_MANAGE.
Partial update — send only changed fields. Requires CUSTOMER_MANAGE.
Soft-deletes a customer. Returns 400 if customer has open/paid invoices. Requires CUSTOMER_MANAGE.

item.description: Manage tenant customers — the businesses you send invoices to.

item.name: 🛍️ Products

request.description: Adds to product catalog. Name must be unique in tenant. taxPercentage defaults to 0. Requires PRODUCT_MANAGE.
Paginated product list (active + inactive). Optional ?search= filters by name. Requires PRODUCT_MANAGE.
All active products sorted alphabetically. Not paginated — for invoice line item dropdowns. Requires BILLING_MANAGE.
Returns a single product including deactivated ones. Requires PRODUCT_MANAGE.
Partial update. Price changes do NOT affect existing invoices (values snapshotted at creation). Requires PRODUCT_MANAGE.
Deactivates a product — cannot be added to new invoices. Historical line items unaffected. Requires PRODUCT_MANAGE.
Re-enables a deactivated product for use in new invoices. Requires PRODUCT_MANAGE.

item.description: Manage tenant product and service catalog.

item.name: 🧾 Business Invoices

request.description: Creates a DRAFT invoice. Items can reference catalog products (price snapshotted) or be free-text. Requires BILLING_MANAGE.
Paginated list. Optional ?customerId= and ?status= (DRAFT/OPEN/PAID/VOID). Requires BILLING_MANAGE.
Returns invoice with all line items and customer details. Requires BILLING_MANAGE.
Adds a line item to a DRAFT invoice. Returns 400 if not DRAFT. Totals recalculated. Requires BILLING_MANAGE.
Removes a line item from a DRAFT invoice. Returns 400 if not DRAFT. Totals recalculated. Requires BILLING_MANAGE.
DRAFT → OPEN. Sets due date = today + 30 days. Locks line items. Returns 400 if no items or not DRAFT. Requires BILLING_MANAGE.
Fires BUSINESS_INVOICE_SENT event. NotificationService emails customer with PDF attachment. Invoice must be OPEN. Requires BILLING_MANAGE.
DRAFT or OPEN → VOID. Cannot void a PAID invoice. Requires BILLING_MANAGE.
Streams invoice as application/pdf. Filename: {invoiceNumber}.pdf. Content-Disposition: attachment. Requires BILLING_MANAGE.
Creates Razorpay Payment Link for customer to pay online. Idempotent — returns existing link if already created. Invoice must be OPEN. Requires BILLING_MANAGE.

item.description: Lifecycle: DRAFT → OPEN (finalize) → PAID (payment recorded) | VOID (cancelled).

item.name: 💵 Business Payments

request.description: Records a payment against an OPEN invoice. Partial payments supported. Auto-marks invoice PAID when total collected >= invoice total. Requires BILLING_MANAGE.
All payments for an invoice including partial payments. Requires BILLING_MANAGE.
Returns outstanding balance: invoice.total - sum(payments). Returns 0 when fully paid. Requires BILLING_MANAGE.

item.description: Record and track payments received from customers.

item.name: 📊 Business Reports

request.description: Total revenue collected in a date range, broken down by payment method. Requires BILLING_MANAGE.
All OPEN invoices split into overdue (past due date) and current. Outstanding balance per invoice. Requires BILLING_MANAGE.
12 months of invoice/payment data for a year. invoice count, total, collected, outstanding per month. Requires BILLING_MANAGE.

item.description: Revenue, outstanding, and monthly summary reports.

item.name: 🛡️ Admin — Tenants
item.description: Platform admin endpoints to manage all tenants globally

query.description: Filter by status: ACTIVE, INACTIVE, SUSPENDED
Filter by plan: FREE, PRO, ENTERPRISE

request.description: List all tenants with optional status and plan filters.
Get detailed information about a specific tenant including user count and task count.
Change a tenant's operational status. Values: ACTIVE, INACTIVE, SUSPENDED.
Manually change a tenant's billing plan. Values: FREE, PRO, ENTERPRISE.
List all users residing within a specific tenant's schema.
Soft delete a tenant from the platform. Sets deleted=true on public.tenants.

item.name: 🛡️ Admin — Users
item.description: Platform admin endpoints to manage individual users across tenants

request.description: List all users operating inside a specific tenant's schema.
Soft delete a specific user from a specific tenant's schema.

item.name: 🛡️ Admin — Auth

request.description: Platform SUPER_ADMIN login. Returns JWT with isSuperAdmin=true claim.
Refresh SUPER_ADMIN access token using HttpOnly cookie. No body required.
Clears SUPER_ADMIN auth cookies.
Returns userId, email, role from SUPER_ADMIN JWT.

item.description: Platform administrator authentication — separate from tenant auth.

item.name: ❤️ Health
item.description: Application health check

request.description: Returns the health status of the application. No authentication required.
